description_long: This bird features a streamlined body with a predominantly light brown back and head, transitioning into a bluish-green hue along the wings and underparts. The wings are long and pointed, with darker blue and gray tones visible on the flight feathers. Its beak is straight, medium-length, and slightly pointed, well-suited for catching insects. The tail is relatively long and appears straight-edged, with subtle gradation in feather length. The legs are short and not prominently visible, likely gray or dark in color, and the eyes are small and dark, set against the smooth plumage of the head.
description: A slender bird with a brown back, blue-green wings, and a straight, pointed beak. Its tail is long and straight-edged, and the plumage is smooth and subtly colored.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's brown back, blue-green wings, and straight beak profile.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad, straight-edged tail and the brown coloration of the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar brown and blue-green coloration, showing the smooth contour of the body and wings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the pointed beak, rounded head, and subtle blue-green underparts.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid brown on the back and head with a gradient to blue-green on the wings and underparts; subtle, smooth transitions without distinct spots or bars.
